query:
SELECT 
  ql.id as leadId, ql.name, ql.phone, ql.createdAt as leadCreatedAt,
  cs.id as sessionId, cs.isBooked, cs.updatedAt, cs.lastAiMessageAt,
  cs.stage, cs.messageHistory
FROM quote_leads ql
LEFT JOIN conversation_sessions cs ON cs.leadPhone = ql.phone
WHERE ql.name LIKE '%Rohan%' OR ql.name LIKE '%Amy%' OR ql.name LIKE '%amy%'
ORDER BY ql.createdAt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user QXWpcJKwPBoGqNG.f679bd03aa5d --database CAeRhAUjAZoEuxNGm5QbPr --execute 
SELECT 
  ql.id as leadId, ql.name, ql.phone, ql.createdAt as leadCreatedAt,
  cs.id as sessionId, cs.isBooked, cs.updatedAt, cs.lastAiMessageAt,
  cs.stage, cs.messageHistory
FROM quote_leads ql
LEFT JOIN conversation_sessions cs ON cs.leadPhone = ql.phone
WHERE ql.name LIKE '%Rohan%' OR ql.name LIKE '%Amy%' OR ql.name LIKE '%amy%'
ORDER BY ql.createdAt DESC;
